# Quick Sale order

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:a6993b0d83d0cfd75e0632def2d0ff12982049ab52c910ab2f8a8f083068ade8
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module allows to add easily products into the sale order (mass line add/update).

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Usage

Inside a sale order, you can click on "Add products", to open a product tree view, then update "qty to sale" field.

The update of "qty to sale" will add new sale line or update the existing line. If qty to sale is 0 it sale line will deleted if it exists.

## Bug Tracker

Bugs are tracked on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/OCA/sale-workflow/issues).
In case of trouble, please check there if your issue has already been reported.
If you spotted it first, help us to smash it by providing a detailed and welcomed
[feedback](https://github.com/OCA/sale-workflow/issues/new?body=module:%20sale_quick%0Aversion:%2014.0%0A%0A**Steps%20to%20reproduce**%0A-%20...%0A%0A**Current%20behavior**%0A%0A**Expected%20behavior**).

Do not contact contributors directly about support or help with technical issues.

methods.name: odoo.addons.sale_quick.models.product_product.ProductProduct.check_access_rights
documentation: hijack product edition rights if we're in the mass edition menu

methods.name: odoo.addons.sale_quick.tests.test_quick_sale.TestQuickSale.test_quick_line_add_1
documentation:
set non-null quantity to any product with no PO line:
  -> a new PO line is created with that quantity

methods.name: odoo.addons.sale_quick.tests.test_quick_sale.TestQuickSale.test_quick_line_add_2
documentation:
same as previous, but include a different UoM as well
We duplicate _setUpBasicSaleOrder except we ~simultaneously~
write on qty_to_process as well as quick_uom_id
(we want to make sure to test _inverse function when it is triggered twice)

methods.name: odoo.addons.sale_quick.tests.test_quick_sale.TestQuickSale.test_quick_line_update_1
documentation:
set non-null quantity to any product with an already existing PO line:
  -> same PO line is updated with that quantity

methods.name: odoo.addons.sale_quick.tests.test_quick_sale.TestQuickSale.test_quick_line_update_2
documentation: same as previous update only UoM in isolation, not qty

methods.name: odoo.addons.sale_quick.tests.test_quick_sale.TestQuickSale.test_quick_line_update_3
documentation: same as previous 2 tests combined: we do simultaneous qty + uom updates

methods.name: odoo.addons.sale_quick.tests.test_quick_sale.TestQuickSale.test_quick_line_delete
documentation:
set null quantity to any product with existing PO line:
  -> PO line is deleted

methods.name: odoo.addons.sale_quick.tests.test_quick_sale.TestQuickSale.test_open_quick_view
documentation: Test that the "Add" button opens the right action

methods.name: odoo.addons.sale_quick.tests.test_quick_sale.TestQuickSale.test_several_so_for_one_product
documentation:
Test that when we try to mass add a product that already has
several lines with the same product we get a raise

methods.name: odoo.addons.sale_quick.tests.test_quick_sale.TestQuickSale.test_saler_can_edit_products
documentation:
While in the quick sale interface, a saler with no edit rights
on product.product can still edit product.product quick quantities
